revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_TOC_custom here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Category_TOC_custom for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{TOC top|title={{{title|{{MediaWiki:Toc}}}}}|align={{{align|}}}|clear={{{clear|}}}|primary={{{primary|}}}}}{{#ifeq:{{{top|yes}}}|yes| * [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}}} Top]}}<!-- -->{{#if:{{{start|}}}{{{stop|}}}{{{by|}}} |{{for loop||call = Category TOC custom/core |start={{{start|0}}} |stop={{{stop|{{CURRENTYEAR}}}}} |by={{{by|20}}} |pv=1 |pc1n=2 |pc1v={{{bulleted|}}} |pc2n=3
